clusters.justification: These terms map onto macroscopic affective-salience circuitry responsible for generalized emotional reactivity, arousal, and valence processing.
These concepts are subserved by ventromedial and cortico-striatal circuits that compute subjective value and integrate it into motivational drive and choice.
These terms consistently co-activate the default mode network, which supports internally constructed, referential representations of the self, others, and temporal narratives.
